game_image_mapping.comment: pgsoft, betsoft, etc (granularidade abaixo de vendor_id)

game_image_mapping.comment: Categoria do catalogo Pragmatic: slots | live | (drawgames)

game_image_mapping.name: game_type_desc
game_image_mapping.comment: Tipo bruto do provedor (ex: European Roulette, Speed Blackjack 1)

game_image_mapping.name: live_subtype
game_image_mapping.comment: Normalizado para front: Roleta | Blackjack | Baccarat | GameShow | Outros

game_image_mapping.name: rounds_24h
game_image_mapping.comment: Total de rodadas (bets) nas ULTIMAS 24h ROLANTES (a partir do refresh)

game_image_mapping.name: popularity_rank_24h
game_image_mapping.comment: Ranking 1=mais jogado nas ultimas 24h rolantes (NULL = sem atividade)

game_image_mapping.name: popularity_window_end
game_image_mapping.comment: Timestamp UTC do fim da janela 24h (= momento do refresh)

game_image_mapping.name: total_bet_24h
game_image_mapping.comment: Valor total apostado (R$) nas ultimas 24h rolantes

game_image_mapping.name: total_wins_24h
game_image_mapping.comment: Valor total ganho (R$) nas ultimas 24h rolantes
